2200100.name: YAMC - Yet Another Minesweeper Client
2200100.description:
Yet Another Minesweeper Client is here to evoke pure apathy from onlookers! Come play the newest reimagining of that game that comes with most operating systems, with such features as:
  • Guaranteed Solvability - No more 50/50s!
  • Non-standard Grids - Triangle and Hexagon grids included
  • Wrapping Grids - Edgeless versions of all grids
  • Dungeon Sweeper - An RPG twist on Minesweeper

So come play minesweeper yet again!
